mapper.insert: insert into setmeal (category_id, name, price, status, description, image, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{status}, #{description}, #{image}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update setmeal
name = #{setmeal.name},
category_id = #{setmeal.categoryId},
price = #{setmeal.price},
status = #{setmeal.status},
description = #{setmeal.description},
image = #{setmeal.image},
create_time = #{setmeal.createTime},
update_time = #{setmeal.updateTime},
update_user = #{setmeal.updateUser},
where id = #{id}
